name: Western Copper and Gold Corporation
description: Western Copper and Gold Corporation is a development-stage company advancing the Casino Project, one of the largest undeveloped copper-gold resources in North America, located approximately 300 km northwest of Whitehorse, Yukon. The flagship Casino deposit hosts significant reserves of copper, gold, molybdenum, and silver, with a completed feasibility study projecting a 27-year mine life. The company is backed by strategic investors Rio Tinto and Mitsubishi Materials.
